premise: An old-timer at the arcade taps you on the shoulder, drops a quarter on the deck, and says: 'let me tell you about a kid I knew.' Everything you play is the story he is telling.
easterEggs: The attract loop occasionally flashes a Coney Island warehouse for one frame.
The credits cite the Pawnbroker's estate.
The pawnbroker bark 'you remind me of someone' is a frame-narrative tell.
The high-score table is presented as having been signed by other kids he has told this story to.
